description_long: This object is a shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, vented barrel and a wooden full stock. The barrel is black with visible venting along the top, likely for heat dissipation and improved aiming. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact and metallic, with a distinct trigger guard and a visible trigger. The stock and fore-end are made of wood, displaying a natural grain pattern and ergonomic shaping for comfortable handling. The overall form is streamlined, with a balance between the metallic and wooden components. The shotgun's design suggests it is intended for practical use, with robust construction and clear functional elements.
description: A classic shotgun with a vented black barrel, wooden full stock, and compact metallic receiver. The design is streamlined and functional, combining wood and metal elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the vented barrel, wooden stock, and trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, vented barrel, and receiver from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Single-barrel with visible venting along the top of the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
